title: Origins Redux Oni
description: A Datapack/Mod that adds the Oni Origin from my Datapack/Mod Origins Redux
body:
## This Datapack/Mod adds the Oni Origin of my Mod Origins Redux.
## This is a Datapack made for the Minecraft Origin mod as a sort of addon.
_This Datapack adds an additional Origin to the standard Origins_

### Description of the Origin
Oni: "A fierce demon warrior with immense strength and durability, but cursed by sunlight and driven by a thirst for power."

**For more look up my Datapack Origins Redux**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

[https://modrinth.com/datapack/origins-redux](https://modrinth.com/datapack/origins-redux)

</details>

_Supported version is 1.20.1_
